text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 379 

PRE_ICL_MO_COPAY_OS 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Mail Order Pharmacy Copay for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a day’s supply of the drugs (other than 1- or 
3-months) on this tier, using a standard mail order pharmacy during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) 
phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
